title: Okhouan
content:
A mole shows black
    Between her mouth and cheek.

    As if a negro,
    Coming into a garden,
    Wavered between a purple rose
    And a scarlet camomile.

    From the Arabic.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator) delivers a powerful performance in "Okhouan"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
